mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT rm.menu_id FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0
